location.address: Alexandrou Papanastasiou & Michel Mitsaki, Thessaloniki, Greece

about.summary: Student accommodation Papanastasiou: sunny private studio in Eastern Thessaloniki. This 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed balcony studio is ideal for students and digital nomads.

sections.title: 🏠 Student Accommodation Papanastasiou – Sunny Studio
sections.content: Student accommodation Papanastasiou — this sunny, fully equipped studio is designed for one tenant and features a double bed and a spacious balcony, ideal for students seeking independent living.
highlights: Comfortable configuration: 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed setup for single occupancy.
Sunny balcony: Private outdoor corner bringing in beautiful natural light.
Fully equipped: Dedicated workspace, washing machine, private kitchenware, and Wi-Fi.

sections.title: 📍 Location in Eastern Thessaloniki
sections.content: Living in Eastern Thessaloniki near Papanastasiou keeps your academic life central. Aristotle University and City College are within easy walking distance or a short bus ride from the nearby bus stop.
highlights: Top convenience: Supermarkets, bakeries, cafes, and taverns are just 50 meters away.
Erasmus housing: Situated in a quiet residential neighbourhood with easy city transit.

sections.title: 🎓 Perfect for Erasmus Students & Nomads
sections.content:
This studio Thessaloniki Papanastasiou is a top option for remote digital nomads and university students. For official info, visit Aristotle University and City College.

To compare other properties in the building, view our Papanastasiou student studio.

sections.title: Bills & Services
sections.content:
Maintenance, water, heating, and Wi-Fi are included. Electricity is billed separately. A bi-weekly cleaning service is available for a small fee.

We look forward to welcoming you to Thessaloniki. Reach out via the contact host button.

seo.seo_description: Student accommodation Papanastasiou: sunny 1-bed balcony studio in Eastern Thessaloniki. Perfect for Erasmus students & digital nomads.
